---
title: '`syncweaver patch`'
---

Create, mark, and list canonical patch artifacts that record host-side
customisations to vendored source content.

| Subcommand | Description |
|---|---|
| [`create`](create.qmd) | Create or update a canonical patch file for a tracked source path |
| [`list`](list.qmd) | List tracked patch file records for a source path |
| [`mark-status`](mark-status.qmd) | Record patch lifecycle status metadata in the lockfile |

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver patch --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```
